test-code.description: other local variable declarations don't count towards the distance (#6846)
grouped declarations not at the top of the block are still ignored (#6846)
declarations interspersed with executable statements are still counted (#6846)

expected-messages.message: Distance between declaration of 'a' and its first usage is 8, current threshold is 7
